user.title: Intelligent Preheating
user.description: Create a new zone. The system automatically learns how long the room takes to heat up.

data.name: Zone Name
data.schedule_entity: Schedule Helper (required when Optimal Stop is enabled)

error.buffer_too_high: Safety buffer exceeds 120 minutes - value too high
error.max_duration_too_high: Maximum preheat duration over 12 hours poses safety risk
error.required_for_optimal_stop: Schedule entity is required when Optimal Stop is enabled.

init.title: Zone Settings
init.description: Default settings are usually sufficient. Enable expert mode for fine-tuning.

data.off_only_when_warm: Heat until target reached (even if occupied)

error.buffer_too_high: Safety buffer exceeds 120 minutes - value too high
error.max_duration_too_high: Maximum preheat duration over 12 hours poses safety risk
error.required_for_optimal_stop: Schedule entity is required when Optimal Stop is enabled.

missing_entity.title: Missing entity in {name}
missing_entity.description: The entity `{entity}` configured in zone {name} is unavailable or missing. Please check configuration or the sensor.

data_migrated.title: Migration completed for {name}
data_migrated.description: Historical data from v1 was converted. Precision may be reduced initially. Use 'Analyze History' button to rebuild from recorder data for better accuracy.

weather_setup_failed.title: Weather Entity Unavailable ({zone_name})
weather_setup_failed.description: The configured weather entity `{weather_entity}` for zone `{zone_name}` is not responding or does not exist. Please check your configuration.

duration_limit_exceeded.title: Max Heating Duration Exceeded ({name})
duration_limit_exceeded.description: The calculated required preheat duration is **{predicted} hours**, which exceeds your configured limit of **{limit} hours**. Please increase the 'Max Preheat Duration' in the integration options to ensure the target temperature is reached.

missing_schedule_entity.title: Missing Schedule for Optimal Stop ({name})
missing_schedule_entity.description: Optimal Stop is enabled for zone {name} (ID: {entry_id}), but no Schedule Entity is configured. The feature will not work correctly. Please reconfigure the integration and select a valid Schedule entity, or disable Optimal Stop.

physics_partial_reset.title: Thermal Model Recalibrated ({name})
physics_partial_reset.description: The physics engine was updated. Your heating history ({samples} sessions) was preserved, but insulation data was reset to profile defaults. The system will re-learn outdoor influences over the next 5-10 heating cycles.

forecast_stale.title: Forecast Data Stale ({name})
forecast_stale.description:
The weather forecast cache has not updated for over 2 hours. The simulation is using outdated data.

**Common Causes:**
- Weather provider API limit reached.
- Internet connectivity issues.

weather_quality.title: Low Quality Forecast: {type} ({name})
weather_quality.description: The system is falling back to {type} data, which is interpolated. Precision reduced.

valve_saturation.title: Valve Saturated >3h ({name})
valve_saturation.description: The valve has been open >95% for over 3 hours. The room is struggling to reach temperature.

physics_limit_mass_min.title: Thermal Mass Too Low ({name})
physics_limit_mass_min.description:
The thermal mass model has hit the minimum limit (1.0). The room heats faster than physically possible.

**Possible Causes:**
- Temperature sensor near heat source.
- Room extremely small.

**Current Value:** {current}

physics_limit_mass_max.title: Thermal Mass Too High ({name})
physics_limit_mass_max.description:
The thermal mass model has hit the maximum limit. The room heats much slower than expected.

**Possible Causes:**
- Valve blocked.
- Sensor insulated.
- Undersized heating.

**Current Value:** {current}

physics_limit_loss_max.title: High Heat Loss DETECTED ({name})
physics_limit_loss_max.description:
The room cools down very rapidly or struggles to hold heat.

**Possible Causes:**
- Open Window / Draft.
- Poor Insulation.
- Bad Outdoor Sensor.

**Current Value:** {current}

zombie_schedule.title: Schedule Empty ({name})
zombie_schedule.description:
Optimal Stop is enabled, but the Schedule entity has no upcoming events.

**Fix:** Add events to your Schedule Helper.

stale_sensor.title: Temp Sensor Stale ({name})
stale_sensor.description:
Room Temperature sensor has not updated for > 6 hours.

**Fix:** Check battery or Zigbee link.

weather_no_forecast.title: No Forecast on Weather Entity ({name})
weather_no_forecast.description: Advanced Physics is on, but the Weather entity provides no forecast data.

adv_no_weather.title: Advanced Mode Missing Weather ({name})
adv_no_weather.description: Advanced Physics (Euler) requires a configured Weather Entity.

forecast_short.title: Forecast too Short ({name})
forecast_short.description: The forecast horizon is shorter than 'Max Coast Duration'. Reduce Coast Duration or get better weather provider.

occupancy_stale.title: Occupancy Stuck ({name})
occupancy_stale.description: Occupancy sensor has not changed state for > 7 days. Check sensor.

hold_stuck.title: Hold Active > 24h ({name})
hold_stuck.description: Logic Hold switch is ON > 24h. System disabled.

inhibit_stuck.title: Inhibit/Window > 24h ({name})
inhibit_stuck.description: System inhibited by Window/External Sensor for > 24h.

learning_stalled.title: Learning Stalled ({name})
learning_stalled.description: Model hasn't learned for > 7 days. Check Delta T and Valve Position.

no_outdoor_source.title: No Outdoor Source ({name})
no_outdoor_source.description: No Outdoor Temp or Weather entity configured.

coast_capped.title: Coast Capped ({name})
coast_capped.description: Optimal Stop frequently hit the 'Max Coast Duration' limit. Consider increasing it.

max_coast_high.title: Max Coast High for Radiators ({name})
max_coast_high.description: Value > 3h is too high for radiators. Recommended: 1.0 - 2.0h.
